')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_pedido_lf as oi_pedido_lf, t0.c_pedido_lf as c_pedido_lf, t0.f_crea as f_crea, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.n_monto_total as n_monto_total, t0.n_monto_inicial as n_monto_inicial, t0.d_pago as d_pago, t0.f_nec_fondos as f_nec_fondos, t0.f_anula as f_anula, t0.f_aprueba as f_aprueba, t0.f_rechaza as f_rechaza, t0.f_cumple as f_cumple, SEC.policy, t0.c_pedido_lf as CODE, t0.c_pedido_lf as TEXT, t0.oi_carpeta as oi_carpeta, t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea, t0.oi_ubicacion as oi_ubicacion FROM LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.PedidosLiqFinal.PEDIDO_LF\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_pedido_lf LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t0.oi_carpeta ={#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY oi_pedido_lf asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_permiso_abm
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG01_CARPETAS.l_cerrado, LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA.c_tipo_carpeta, LEG31_ESTADOS.c_estado
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS, LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA, LEG31_ESTADOS
JOIN LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_tipo_carpeta INNER LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA.oi_tipo_carpeta, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_estado_carpeta INNER LEG31_ESTADOS.oi_estado
WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta = {#PARAM:@id}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetTitulo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS, ORG03_EMPRESAS
JOIN LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta = {#PARAM:@id}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetTitulo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_ubicacion
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS, ORG03_EMPRESAS
JOIN LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE {%? (#PARAM:oi_carpeta/@value!='') {% LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta = {#PARAM:oi_carpeta/@value} %} {% LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta = {#PARAM:@id} %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW
